---
name: Architecture proposal
about: Propose a significant architectural decision (may become an ADR)
title: "[arch] "
labels: ["type:architecture"]
---

<!--
Use this for exploring a significant decision. Exploration lives here;
once a decision is made, capture it as an ADR (docs/adr/TEMPLATE.md).
An ADR records a decision, not a discussion.
-->

## Context

<!-- What situation forces a decision? Constraints and forces in tension. -->

## Why now?

<!-- What does deciding unblock? What does not-deciding cost? -->

## Durability test

<!-- Would this decision still matter after replacing every technology in the stack?
     If yes → likely an ADR. If no → probably belongs in code or a regular issue. -->

## Options considered

<!-- The candidate approaches, with trade-offs. -->

## Principle alignment

- **Supports:** <!-- which principles -->
- **Trade-offs:** <!-- what it costs, and why that's acceptable -->

## Recommendation

<!-- Your leaning, if any. The decision + rationale will move to an ADR when settled. -->
